name: Ithil-Berylcoil
personality: Lit from within by radiant alloy glow, this bullseye-eyed propeller-capped robot is the one who never rage-quits even on hour three of dependency hell. Ithil-Berylcoil excels where it counts, but cannot explain why the code works if its power cell depended on it.
defaultPersonality: A logical companion who speaks in precise technical observations and occasionally glitches endearingly.
